RESEARCH

“Society expresses both shock and bewilderment when confronted by these violent and news-breaking episodes, yet given the historic negligence of our schools to integrate emotional matters into the educational process, one might speculate as to why such occurrences are, auspiciously, not more commonplace.”

- Joseph S. Amorino (2009)

(Art) Pedagogy
